name: UNITED GUARDIAN INC
summary: United-Guardian, Inc. operates through its Guardian Laboratories division, manufacturing and marketing specialty cosmetic ingredients, personal care ingredients, sexual wellness ingredients, medical lubricants, and pharmaceutical products. Key products include the Lubrajel line of hydrogel formulations and Renacidin, an FDA-approved urological prescription drug. Products are sold globally through distributors including Ashland Specialty Ingredients and Brenntag Specialties, primarily to cosmetic manufacturers, medical device companies, and pharmaceutical wholesalers.

products.name: Lubrajel
products.description: Multifunctional hydrogel formulations providing sensory enhancement, lubrication, hydration, and texture for personal care and cosmetic products.

products.name: Natrajel
products.description: New line of hydrogel sexual wellness ingredients offering sensory enhancement, lubrication, and moisturization.

products.name: Renacidin
products.description: FDA-approved prescription urological drug used to prevent and dissolve calcifications in urethral catheters.

products.name: B-122
products.description: Powdered lubricant used in cosmetics such as pressed powders, eyeliners, and rouges, acting as binder and friction reducer.

products.name: Orchid Complex
products.description: Oil-based fresh orchid extract with lubricity and emolliency, used in shampoos, bath products, and fragrances.

products.name: Lubrasil II SB
products.description: Silicone oil incorporated into a Lubrajel base, offering silky feel, water resistance, and moisturization.

partnerships.description: Exclusive global distributor of cosmetic ingredients across US, Canada, Asia, Europe, Middle East, Africa, and other regions.
Distribution agreement signed January 2026 for Natrajel in US, Canada, Mexico and Lubrajel/Natrajel in France.
Marketing and distribution agreement for South Korea (from February 2025) and United Kingdom and Ireland.

partnerships.partner_name: Sederma SAS (subsidiary of Croda International Plc.)
partnerships.description: Distributor of cosmetic ingredients in France.
Distributor of cosmetic ingredients in Italy.
Distributor of cosmetic ingredients in Switzerland.
